testcase.name: test_401_no_token
testcase.failure:
def test_401_no_token(): # Calling a protected route without Bearer token response = client.get("/api/v1/products") > assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 504 == 401 E + where 504 = <Response [504 Gateway Timeout]>.status_code
tests\test_auth.py:35: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_401_invalid_token
testcase.failure:
def test_401_invalid_token(): # Expired token expired_token = create_token("user1", "admin", -10) response = client.get( "/api/v1/products", headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {expired_token}"} ) > assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 504 == 401 E + where 504 = <Response [504 Gateway Timeout]>.status_code
tests\test_auth.py:46: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_403_insufficient_role
test_success_and_header_enrichment

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'user_admin' + where None = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'})>('x-user-id') + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'})> = Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'}).get + where Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'}) = <Request('DELETE', 'http://service-1-product:5002/api/v1/products/1')>.headers

testcase.failure:
@respx.mock def test_success_and_header_enrichment(): # Mock target mock_route = respx.delete("http://service-1-product:5002/api/v1/products/1").mock( return_value=httpx.Response(204) )
admin_token = create_token("user_admin", "admin")
response = client.delete( "/api/v1/products/1", headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {admin_token}"} )
# 204 No Content expected per RMM rules for DELETE assert response.status_code == 204 assert mock_route.called
# Check Enrichment Headers passed_request = mock_route.calls[0].request > assert passed_request.headers.get("x-user-id") == "user_admin" E AssertionError: assert None == 'user_admin' E + where None = <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'})>('x-user-id') E + where <bound method Headers.get of Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'})> = Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'}).get E + where Headers({'host': 'service-1-product:5002', 'accept': '*/*', 'accept-encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'user-agent': 'testclient', 'authorization': '[secure]', 'x-user-role': 'anonymous'}) = <Request('DELETE', 'http://service-1-product:5002/api/v1/products/1')>.headers
tests\test_auth.py:95: AssertionError
